1.subject: New Commercial Property Insurance Application - Greenfield Logistics Ltd
1.body:
Dear Claims Team,

Please find attached our completed application for commercial property insurance for Greenfield Logistics Ltd. We are seeking coverage for our new warehouse facility located at Unit 14, Mersey Industrial Park, Liverpool, L20 8JX.

Key details:
- Insured value: £2,400,000
- Building type: Industrial warehouse (3,200 sq ft)
- Current security: CCTV, 24h guard, sprinkler system
- Start date requested: 01 April 2026

All supporting documentation including previous insurance history and site survey report has been attached to this email. Please confirm receipt and let us know if any additional information is required.

Kind regards,
James Hartley
Finance Director, Greenfield Logistics Ltd
Tel: +44 151 334 7821

2.subject: RE: Policy Renewal – Commercial Motor Fleet – Policy No. IAT-CMF-2024-00872
2.body:
Hello,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing regarding the upcoming renewal of our commercial motor fleet insurance policy (Policy No. IAT-CMF-2024-00872), which is due to expire on 31 March 2026.

We would like to proceed with the renewal for another 12-month term. Since our last renewal, we have added two additional HGVs to our fleet, bringing the total to 18 vehicles. Please find the updated fleet schedule and driver declarations attached.

Changes from last year:
- 2 new vehicles added (Volvo FH16 – reg. SW74 HJK and SW74 HJL)
- 1 driver added: Mr. Daniel Morey (DOB: 12/05/1988, licence no. MOREY812123DW)
- 0 claims in the past 12 months

We look forward to receiving your renewal quotation at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Sarah Okonkwo
Fleet Manager, Swift Distribution Ltd
Direct: +44 20 7946 0314

3.subject: Query: Clarification on Public Liability Coverage Limits
3.body:
Hi there,

I am writing to seek clarification on our current public liability policy (Policy No. IAT-PL-2025-04421). Specifically, we need to understand:

1. Whether our current £5M aggregate limit applies per event or per policy year?
2. Are third-party software contractors who work on-site covered under our policy, or do they need their own liability insurance?
3. Is there a sub-limit applying to data-related incidents (e.g. a contractor accidentally deleting client data)?

We have a client audit coming up in three weeks and need to confirm our coverage details in writing. Attached is our current policy schedule for reference.

Thank you for your help.

Best wishes,
Tom Pickering
Head of Operations, Brightspace Technologies Ltd
Email: t.pickering@brightspacetech.io

4.subject: FORMAL COMPLAINT – Delay in Claim Settlement – Claim Ref: CLM-2026-00341
4.body:
To Whom It May Concern,

I am writing to formally raise a complaint regarding the unacceptable delay in settling our outstanding claim (Claim Reference: CLM-2026-00341).

Our claim was submitted on 12 January 2026 following a burst pipe incident at our premises which caused significant water damage to stock and equipment. Despite multiple follow-up calls and emails over the past 7 weeks, we have yet to receive:
- A written acknowledgement of our claim
- A visit from a loss adjuster
- Any interim payment

This delay is causing serious financial hardship to our business. We are a small family-run catering supplier and the damaged equipment has left us unable to fulfil several large contracts.

I request that this complaint be escalated to your senior complaints team immediately. If I do not receive a satisfactory response within 5 working days, I will have no option but to escalate this matter to the Financial Ombudsman Service.

Please see all supporting evidence and correspondence history attached.

Yours sincerely,
Michelle Farrow
Director, Farrow & Sons Catering Supplies Ltd
Tel: +44 1789 554 322

5.subject: Supporting Documents for Claim – Fire Damage – Claim Ref: CLM-2026-00298
5.body:
Dear Claims Handler,

Following our telephone conversation with your office on 19 February 2026, please find attached the requested supporting documentation for our fire damage claim (Claim Reference: CLM-2026-00298).

Documents enclosed:
1. Independent fire investigation report (commissioned by us)
2. Itemised inventory of all damaged fixtures, fittings, and kitchen equipment
3. Three contractor repair quotes (Williams Contractors Ltd, ABR Restorations, Premier Build UK)
4. Post-incident photographs (48 images, taken 18 February 2026)
5. Copies of original invoices for replaced equipment

Please confirm receipt of these documents. Our preferred contact for this claim is Ms. Rita Kapoor (rita.kapoor@sunrisehospitality.co.uk) who is managing the restoration project.

We are keen to progress this claim as quickly as possible as we have a planned reopening date of 1 May 2026.

Kind regards,
Anika Patel
General Manager, Sunrise Hospitality Group
Mobile: +44 7823 441 899
